result.reply: printable string up to 2048 characters, or null when the turn was aborted
result.events: count of streamed event records for this turn

result.turns: up to the last 8 turns with id, at, message, reply, reason (text truncated to 96 characters)

result.aborted: true when the targeted turn was in flight and has been signalled

capabilities.purpose: chat.send delegates every completion to the embedder-controlled host boundary; the agent holds no provider access of its own
